rows.label: qev200801_MSG0002
rows.name:
I take it you are here because you
completed all the trials I assigned you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Then you are a BLADE worthy
of possessing my greatest
invention. My...masterpiece.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_MSG0004
rows.name:
The mechanical field skill, capable
of unraveling every mystery this
enigmatic world can offer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_MSG0005
rows.name:
I can install the skill straight
to your Blue Blood immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that you still need to emotionally prepare yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_MSG0007
rows.name:
Fair enough. Being able to see
everything means you will no doubt
see some things you'd rather not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_MSG0008
rows.name:
Return to me once you have
steeled yourself to bear the
burden of that knowledge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_MSG0010
rows.name:
With this, you will become host to
the sum total of human wisdom, built
up since the dawn of history![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Now I must excuse myself. I look forward
to news of your continued exploits.[ST:wait ]
